arts.ttl: Milan’s Fonseca future in jeopardy as Conceição emerges as contender
arts.sum: The future of Paulo Fonseca as head coach of AC Milan hangs in the balance following a series of underwhelming performances. Despite narrowly defeating Hellas Verona in their last match, Fonseca's position remains precarious, with the team currently sitting in eighth place in Serie A, far from the Champions League qualification spots. The post Milan’s Fonseca future in jeopardy as Conceição emerges as contender appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Why isn’t Christian Pulisic playing for AC Milan against Roma in Serie A today?
arts.sum: Christian Pulisic has been one of the players of the season for AC Milan in Serie A in Italy, although the USMNT star will end 2024 on a disappointing note by missing the Rossoneri’s final game of the year at home to Roma on Sunday (December 29). There had been hope Pulisic would feature before New Year, only for the American to suffer a new injury in the run-up to the Roma matchup.
